findings.description: The overall_pass_rate computation reuses `totalAssertions` from line 75 (computed from evalsFile.evals) rather than from benchmarkCases. In normal operation these should be equal, but if an eval case errors out mid-run, the counts could diverge. Consider using benchmarkCases as the source for consistency with assembleBulkResult().

notes: 4 changes: engine bug fix (5 lines), figma-connect eval rewrite (46 assertions), survey-passing eval fix + 2 new cases, SKILL.md Gmail optional. All JSON valid, tests pass (31/31). The engine fix correctly adds overall_pass_rate to CLI benchmark output matching the server's assembleBulkResult pattern.
